01

The Product Story

What problem does this solve — and why does it exist?

产品故事

它解决了什么问题——为什么存在？

30 minutes. Every. Single. Job.

Picture the job search grind. You find an interesting role. Then the clock starts — read the JD carefully, rewrite your cover letter for this specific company, figure out which keywords the ATS scanner is looking for, assess whether your experience actually matches the requirements.

That's 30+ minutes. Multiply by 50 applications. That's a part-time job just to apply for a job.

每投一份简历，都要花30分钟

想象求职的日常：找到一个感兴趣的职位，时钟开始倒计时——仔细阅读JD，针对这家公司重写求职信，研究ATS关键词，评估自身经历是否符合要求。

这一套下来要30分钟以上。投50份就是25小时——相当于一份兼职。

⏱️
30+ minutes
Average time to tailor a single application — cover letter, keywords, self-assessment
30+ 分钟
每次投递所需时间——包括写求职信、筛关键词、自我评估
📋
50+ applications
Typical volume for an active job seeker in a competitive market
50+ 份申请
激烈竞争市场中，积极求职者的典型投递量
🔁
Mostly repetitive
Same skills, same projects, rephrased slightly for each role — exhausting manual work
大量重复劳动
相同的技能、相同的项目，只是换个说法——机械又耗力

30 seconds instead of 30 minutes

The AI Job Application Agent collapses that 30-minute process into a single action. Paste a job URL or description. In about 15–20 seconds, you get everything you need to apply.

从30分钟压缩到30秒

AI 求职助手把这套繁琐流程压缩成一个动作。粘贴职位链接或描述，约15–20秒后，所有申请材料一次性到位。

🎯
Match Score
An honest 0–100 rating of how well your background fits this specific role
匹配分数
真实的0–100分，客观评估你与该职位的契合度
📊
Skill Gap Analysis
Which requirements you meet, which you're missing, and how to address the gaps
技能差距分析
哪些要求你已具备，哪些还欠缺，以及如何弥补
✍️
Tailored Cover Letter
A role-specific cover letter that references this company and this JD — not a template
定制求职信
针对这家公司、这个职位量身撰写的求职信——不是通用模板
🔑
ATS Keywords
The exact terms from the JD to weave into your resume to pass automated screening
ATS 关键词
直接从JD提取的关键词，帮你通过自动筛选
🎤
Interview Coaching
Send an interview question, get the skill it's testing + talking points + project to reference
面试辅导
发送面试题，获得考察点 + 回答思路 + 最佳项目参考

What it feels like to use it

The product communicates as a conversation — through CLI or a Feishu chat. The interaction is deliberately designed in two steps: a free instant preview, then a deeper AI analysis on demand.

实际使用体验

产品以对话形式交互——通过命令行或飞书机器人。交互流程被刻意设计为两步：先免费预览，再按需触发深度 AI 分析。

A typical session 典型对话流程
U
https://company.com/jobs/data-analyst-role
A
🎯 Match Score: 68% — 12 matched, 5 missing. Want full analysis + cover letter? (yes / no)
🎯 匹配分数：68% — 匹配12项，缺失5项。需要完整分析和求职信吗？（yes / no）
U
yes
A
✅ Analysis done. Cover letter saved. Got an interview? (yes / no)
✅ 分析完成，求职信已保存。收到面试邀请了吗？（yes / no）
U
yes — "Tell me about handling ambiguous data requirements."
yes — "请描述一次你处理模糊数据需求的经历"
A
🎯 This tests problem structuring. 3 talking points + best project to reference...
🎯 这道题考察问题拆解能力。以下是3个回答要点 + 最适合引用的项目...

The PM lens on the core promise

The product's value can be measured by the time it reclaims and the quality it preserves. A good PM wouldn't just say "make it faster" — they'd define what faster means and how to know if they got there.

产品经理视角：核心承诺

产品价值体现在两个维度：节省的时间，以及保留的质量。优秀的产品经理不会只说"做得更快"，而是会明确"快"的定义，以及如何验证是否达到目标。

📋 If This Were a PRD 如果这是一份 PRD
The goal statement might read: "Reduce median time-to-application-ready from 30+ minutes to under 60 seconds for job seekers applying to 5+ roles per week, without reducing cover letter specificity to the role."
目标陈述可以这样写："针对每周投递5个以上职位的求职者，将每次申请的准备时间中位数从30分钟以上压缩到60秒以内，同时不降低求职信对职位的针对性。" 注意它指定了指标、目标值、用户群体和质量约束——而不仅仅是"做得更快"。

The product promises to reduce application prep from 30 minutes to 30 seconds. What's the biggest risk to this value proposition?

产品承诺将申请准备时间从30分钟压缩到30秒。这个价值主张最大的风险是什么？
